heading: Computations on returns or other documents
label: 6102 Computations on returns or other documents
notes: Amendments1976—Subsecs. (a), (b). struck out “or his delegate” after “Secretary”.Pub. L. 94–455
amendments: Amendments1976—Subsecs. (a), (b). struck out “or his delegate” after “Secretary”.Pub. L. 94–455

children.heading: Amounts shown on internal revenue forms
children.label: a Amounts shown on internal revenue forms

children.text: the fractional part of a dollar shall be disregarded; or

the fractional part of a dollar shall be disregarded unless it amounts to one-half dollar or more, in which case the amount (determined without regard to the fractional part of a dollar) shall be increased by $1.

children.heading: Election not to use whole dollar amounts
children.label: b Election not to use whole dollar amounts
children.text: Any person making a return, statement, or other document shall be allowed, under regulations prescribed by the Secretary, to make such return, statement, or other document without regard to subsection (a).

children.heading: Inapplicability to computation of amount
children.label: c Inapplicability to computation of amount
children.text: The provisions of subsections (a) and (b) shall not be applicable to items which must be taken into account in making the computations necessary to determine the amount required to be shown on a form, but shall be applicable only to such final amount.
